zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev Thomas Peavey Sr於1624年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親John Peverel Peverly Sr25歲，母親Edith Wisedom22歲。他於1644年與Jane Walford在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1670年5月26日在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev Thomas Peavey Sr于1624年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲John Peverel Peverly Sr25岁，母亲Edith Wisedom22岁。他于1644年与Jane Walford在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1670年5月26日在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peavey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English or Scottish: unexplained. Compare   Peavy  .
History: Edward Peavey is mentioned in the records of Portsmouth, NH, in1691, as well as Abell, Nathaniel, Joseph, William, and Peter Peavey(probably his sons).

variants.name: Pevey
meanings: Scottish or English: unexplained. Compare   Peavey  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Rev Thomas Peavey Sr was born in 1624, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Peverel Peverly Sr, was 25 and his mother, Edith Wisedom, was 22. He married Jane Walford in 1644, in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 26 May 1670, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev Thomas Peavey Sr est né en 1624, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Peverel Peverly Sr, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Edith Wisedom, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jane Walford en 1644, à Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 mai 1670, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rev Thomas Peavey Sr 1624 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Peverel Peverly Sr 25 und seine Mutter Edith Wisedom 22. Er hat 1644 in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Jane Walford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Mai 1670 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rev Thomas Peavey Sr è nato il nel 1624 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Peverel Peverly Sr, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Edith Wisedom, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Jane Walford nel 1644, nel Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 maggio 1670, nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rev Thomas Peavey Srが1624年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Peverel Peverly Srは25歳，母Edith Wisedomは22歳であった。1644年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムグレエンランドでJane Walfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1670年5月26日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムポルトスモウスで46歳で死去した。

ko.Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 그린랜드
ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Rev Thomas Peavey Sr(이)가 1624년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Peverel Peverly Sr(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Edith Wisedom(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1644년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 그린랜드에서 Jane Walford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1670년 5월 26일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rev Thomas Peavey Sr nasceu em 1624, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Peverel Peverly Sr, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Edith Wisedom, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Walford em 1644, em Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de maio de 1670, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev Thomas Peavey Sr родился в 1624 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Peverel Peverly Sr было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Edith Wisedom, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Walford в 1644 г. в местности гринланд, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 мая 1670 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rev Thomas Peavey Sr nació en 1624, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Peverel Peverly Sr, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Edith Wisedom, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jane Walford en 1644, en Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de mayo de 1670, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 46 años.
